steph-custom-recipes.name: Crockpot Herb Butter Chicken & Wild Rice
steph-custom-recipes.desc: Half Baked Harvest · Serves 6 · 643 cal/serving · 6hr crockpot
steph-custom-recipes.body:
Ingredients

  • 2 lbs chicken thighs or breasts
  • 1 cup wild rice
  • 1 onion, diced
  • 2 carrots, sliced
  • 2 cups mushrooms, sliced
  • 2 stalks celery, sliced
  • 1 tbsp dried parsley
  • 2 tbsp olive oil (divided)
  • 3 cups chicken broth
  • 1 tsp dried thyme
  • 1 tsp dried rosemary
  • 1 tsp paprika
  • Pinch cayenne
  • 1 head garlic cloves, smashed
  • 4 tbsp butter
  • Fresh sage leaves
  • Salt & pepper
  • Parmesan rind (optional)

Instructions

  1. In crockpot, combine wild rice, onion, carrots, mushrooms, celery, dried parsley. Season with salt & pepper. Add 1 tbsp olive oil, toss. Pour over chicken broth.
  2. Toss chicken with 1 tbsp olive oil, thyme, rosemary, paprika, cayenne, salt & pepper. Place in crockpot. Add garlic and parmesan rind if using.
  3. Cover and cook on LOW 5–6 hours or HIGH 2–3 hours.
  4. Before serving, preheat broiler. Remove chicken and garlic, place on baking sheet. Arrange butter and sage around chicken. Broil 1–3 min until crisp.
  5. Peel garlic, chop and mix into butter on pan. Toss chicken in butter.
  6. Fluff rice, serve chicken over rice and veggies. Drizzle remaining butter over top.

Nutrition (per serving)

643 cal · 45g protein · 45g carbs · 28g fat · 4g fibre · 4g sugar

holidays.text: 🐣 Easter Long Weekend — Good Friday Apr 3 → Easter Monday Apr 6, 2026

meals.name: Greek Yogurt Power Bowl
meals.desc: Liberté 11% Greek yogurt (¾ cup) + raspberries (½ cup) + Carbonaut granola (⅓ cup) + hemp hearts (1 tbsp) + drizzle of honey. Quick, no-cook, protein-packed start.

meals.name: HBH Chicken Caesar Kale Salad
meals.desc: Massaged kale + chopped romaine + 1 cup shredded rotisserie chicken + shaved parmesan + croutons + creamy Caesar dressing. Big, filling, and full of flavour.

meals.name: Cottage Cheese + Cucumber & Everything Bagel
meals.desc: ½ cup 2% cottage cheese + sliced cucumber rounds + everything bagel seasoning. Crunchy, creamy, salty — seriously addictive.

meals.name: HBH Crockpot Herb Butter Chicken & Wild Rice
meals.desc: Chicken slow-cooked with wild rice, mushrooms, carrots, celery & garlic. Finished under the broiler with butter and fresh sage. Set it in the morning, dinner is done. Rush will love it.

meals.name: Apple + Almond Butter
meals.desc: 1 medium apple sliced + 1.5 tbsp almond butter. Classic evening snack.

days.totals: ~1,780 cal · 133g protein · 128g carbs · 67g fat · 21g fibre · 39g sugar

meals.name: Protein Oats with Blueberries & Almond Butter
meals.desc: ½ cup rolled oats cooked in 1 cup milk + 1 scoop vanilla protein powder stirred in off-heat + ½ cup blueberries + 1 tbsp almond butter + cinnamon. Warm and cozy.

meals.name: Turkey & Avocado Wrap
meals.desc: 100g deli turkey + ½ avocado + baby spinach + shredded mozzarella + Dijon in a whole wheat tortilla. Quick 5-min lunch.

meals.name: Protein Shake + Berries
meals.desc: 1 scoop vanilla protein + 1 cup unsweetened almond milk + ½ cup frozen mixed berries, blended. Ready in 2 minutes.

meals.name: HBH Sheet Pan Chicken Fajitas
meals.desc: Sliced chicken breast with fajita spices, colourful bell peppers & onion — all one pan. Serve in warm whole wheat tortillas with Greek yogurt, sliced avocado & salsa. Kid-approved!

meals.name: Dark Chocolate & Walnuts
meals.desc: 2 squares 70%+ dark chocolate + small handful walnuts. The perfect evening wind-down treat.

days.totals: ~1,770 cal · 137g protein · 138g carbs · 66g fat · 27g fibre · 33g sugar

meals.name: Egg White Veggie Scramble Wrap
meals.desc: 4 egg whites scrambled with baby spinach, diced bell pepper & crumbled feta. Wrapped in a warm whole wheat tortilla. High protein, light on fat — great Friday start.

meals.name: HBH White Bean & Kale Soup + Sourdough
meals.desc: Warming one-pot white bean soup with kale, diced tomatoes, garlic & Italian seasoning. Ready in 30 min. Served with 1 thick slice sourdough. Cozy Friday lunch vibes.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt + Hemp Hearts + Berries
meals.desc: ½ cup Liberté 11% Greek yogurt + 1 tbsp hemp hearts + ¼ cup mixed berries. Simple, satisfying, high protein.

meals.name: Brunch with Babs Chicken Shawarma Rice Bowls
meals.desc: Chicken thighs marinated in yogurt, lemon, cumin, paprika & garlic — pan-seared until golden. Over fluffy basmati rice with cucumber, tomato, red onion & a garlic yogurt drizzle. Flavourful and family-friendly.

meals.name: Cottage Cheese + Almond Butter Drizzle
meals.desc: ½ cup 2% cottage cheese + 1 tbsp almond butter + pinch of cinnamon. Creamy, protein-packed evening snack.

days.totals: ~1,720 cal · 131g protein · 145g carbs · 61g fat · 25g fibre · 25g sugar
